personalInfo.name: Chanchai Tasujai

certifications.name: Generative AI for Productivity (Self Learning Track)

roles.title: Project Manager
description: Led ATP30 project delivery from scope planning through UAT milestones.
Aligned business, client, and engineering teams to reduce requirement gaps.
achievements: Delivered UAT milestone on schedule under constrained team capacity.
Reduced repeated requirement rework by improving backlog grooming and acceptance criteria.
leadership: Managed cross-functional stakeholders with clear risk and priority communication.
Drove Agile ceremonies (Sprint Planning, Daily Stand-up, Retrospective) for execution consistency.

roles.title: Senior Software Tester
description: Owned test strategy and regression quality gates for critical modules.
Handled quality assurance across manual and automated testing flows.
achievements: Reduced regression testing time by 40% using Robot Framework automation.
Lowered production defect leakage with risk-based testing and stronger test traceability.

roles.title: Software Tester
description: System Analysis & Design: Analyzed requirements and designed system architecture.
Project Management: Managed timelines and cross-team coordination.
QA & Testing: Designed test cases and executed manual/functional testing.
Infrastructure: Supported server and database reliability.
Issue Tracking: Managed bugs and root cause analysis.
achievements: Expanded test coverage in critical modules and reduced repeated post-release defects.
Improved bug reporting workflow, reducing turnaround and re-test cycles.
leadership: Collaborated with enterprise stakeholders such as LION and SPRC on requirement prioritization.
Bridged communication between technical teams and operations users to reduce misunderstandings.

portfolio.title: Transport Management System (ShipManager)
portfolio.description: A logistics operation platform for Suchada 2019 that combines AI OCR, LINE Bot workflows, and actionable dashboards to reduce manual work and improve data quality.

problem: Manual data entry from receipts and slips caused frequent human errors.
Historical document retrieval was slow and inconsistent.
Cost summary per trip was delayed, slowing operational decisions.
solution: Implemented Gemini-powered OCR to extract and validate data before saving to Supabase.
Enabled field teams to upload receipts directly through LINE Bot.
Built dashboard and Excel reporting flow for finance and management visibility.
impact: Significantly reduced repetitive daily paperwork across operations.
Reduced manual entry mistakes in expense and fuel records.
Improved speed of management reporting for transport profitability review.
architecture: Dashboard/Excel Export -> Operational and management reporting

features.title: Core Modules
items: Transport Logging - Manage standard and weight-based transport jobs
Expense Tracking - Track driver expenses and withdrawals
Fuel Logging - Record refueling and calculate costs
Driver Management - Driver profiles and income
Vehicle Management - Vehicle registration and metadata
OCR System - AI extraction from shipping/fuel/expense documents

features.title: Key Features
items: AI OCR for transfer slips, fuel receipts, and shipping forms
LINE Bot integration for real-time field uploads
Support for standard and weight-based transport calculation
Excel export for operations and accounting workflows
Responsive UI for desktop and mobile users

aboutMe.paragraph1: I am a Lamphun native and currently live and work here. Starting as a Computer Teacher, I learned the art of knowledge transfer. Then, as a Software QA, I developed an eye for detail and quality. Advancing to Project Manager gave me a holistic view of business and management.
aboutMe.paragraph2: Today, I merge all these experiences to walk the path of a Full-Stack Developer with a dream of having my own product. Although I may not be a deep-level code wizard, my strength lies in my passion for technology and leveraging modern tools—especially applying AI to multiply productivity.
aboutMe.paragraph3: I don't just aim to "write code" but to "build solutions" because I understand the importance of Business Requirements (PM view), Quality Gates (QA view), and User Experience. I never stop learning and am always ready to adapt to the fast-paced world of innovation.
aboutMe.highlight1.title: Diverse Background
aboutMe.highlight1.desc: Teacher -> QA -> PM -> Dev. A unique blend of skills.
aboutMe.highlight2.title: Full-Stack Capable
aboutMe.highlight2.desc: Proficient in both Frontend (React) and Backend (Node/Supabase).
aboutMe.highlight3.title: Fast Learner
aboutMe.highlight3.desc: Adapting quickly to new tools like AI, Cloud, and Frameworks.
aboutMe.highlight4.title: Quality First
aboutMe.highlight4.desc: Deeply rooted testing mindset ensures robust and bug-free code.
